scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w web" "npm run build -w @local-kg/shared -- --watch --preserveWatchOutput"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @local-kg/shared && npm run build -w web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @local-kg/shared && npm run typecheck -w web
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
